author: Koray Tugberk Gubur
title: Learn Advanced True SEO with Topical Authority 2.0
content: Medium article presenting Topical Authority 2.0, Koray's advanced framework for semantic SEO. The article details how to apply topical authority concepts for better SEO results. Discusses the foundational formula: Topical Authority = Topical Coverage + Historical Data, emphasizing that websites must cover all semantic variations and subtopics of a niche while building a history of reliability and user trust signals. Features the Topical Authority Course with 87 lectures totaling 9 hours, 23 minutes, and 17 seconds of training.
